2603.20648.title: A Multihead Continual Learning Framework for Fine-Grained Fashion Image Retrieval with Contrastive Learning and Exponential Moving Average Distillation
2603.20648.paper_summary: Most fine-grained fashion image retrieval (FIR) methods assume a static setting, requiring full retraining when new attributes appear, which is costly and impractical for dynamic scenarios. Although pretrained models support zero-shot inference, their accuracy drops without supervision, and no prior work explores class-incremental learning (CIL) for fine-grained FIR. We propose a multihead continual learning framework for fine-grained fashion image retrieval with contrastive learning and exponential moving average (EMA) distillation (MCL-FIR). MCL-FIR adopts a multi-head design to accommodate evolving classes across increments, reformulates triplet inputs into doublets with InfoNCE for simpler and more effective training, and employs EMA distillation for efficient knowledge transfer. Experiments across four datasets demonstrate that, beyond its scalability, MCL-FIR achieves a strong balance between efficiency and accuracy. It significantly outperforms CIL baselines under similar training cost, and compared with static methods, it delivers comparable performance while using only about 30% of the training cost. The source code is publicly available in https://github.com/Dr-LingXiao/MCL-FIR.
2603.20648.paper_summary_zh: 大多數細粒度時尚圖像檢索（FIR）方法假設為靜態設置，當出現新屬性時需要完全重新訓練，這在動態場景中是昂貴且不切實際的。雖然預訓練模型支持零樣本推斷，但在沒有監督的情況下，其準確性會下降，且之前的工作未探討細粒度FIR的類增量學習（CIL）。我們提出了一種多頭持續學習框架，用於細粒度時尚圖像檢索，結合對比學習和指數移動平均（EMA）蒸餾（MCL-FIR）。MCL-FIR採用多頭設計，以適應增量中的演變類別，將三元組輸入重新構造成雙元組，並使用InfoNCE進行更簡單和更有效的訓練，並採用EMA蒸餾以實現高效的知識轉移。在四個數據集上的實驗表明，除了其可擴展性外，MCL-FIR在效率和準確性之間實現了良好的平衡。它在相似的訓練成本下顯著超越了CIL基準，與靜態方法相比，僅使用約30%的訓練成本就能提供可比的性能。源代碼可在 https://github.com/Dr-LingXiao/MCL-FIR 上公開獲得。
2603.20648.author: Ling Xiao et.al.
